channel.title: intro on Thoughts from Daniel P.
channel.description: Recent content in intro on Thoughts from Daniel P.

item.title: Let Me Introduce Myself
item.description: Hi, I’m Dan. I’m a pediatric resident with the IU School of Medicine in Indianapolis, which means I spend most of my time at the awesome Riley Hospital for Children. I spent my last month in our intensive care unit, which was a humbling experience in a few different ways. First of all, in terms of how much medicine I still have to learn after 6+ years of education/training.
